heroes.title: Inner HR: The AI Agent for Your Internal Team
heroes.prompt:
## CONCEPT
Visualizing Internal Family Systems (IFS) self-leadership and the integration of internal parts under a central Self.

## ART DIRECTION
Holographic Command style blended with Dark Premium Glass. Deep navy-to-black void background (#0a0a0b) with a subtle, thin network constellation grid.

## SCENE
A large, central, pristine glass sphere representing the integrated 'Self'. The sphere refracts light, glowing with a soft golden-amber and electric-cyan core. Orbiting this central sphere are four floating, semi-transparent glass tiles representing different internal parts (Manager, Protector, Firefighter, Exile). Each tile is intricately detailed with thin holographic wireframe designs of shields, gears, and waves. Thin, elegant laser-like beams of warm gold and cool cyan light stream from the central sphere to connect each orbiting tile, symbolizing organizational alignment and inner harmony.

## COMPOSITION
Centered three-dimensional composition, deep layers, balanced negative space on the sides. Anamorphic lens feel, cinematic depth of field.

## LIGHTING & MOOD
High-contrast studio rim lighting, glowing neon reflections on the glass surfaces, calm, authoritative, and clean.

## PALETTE
Deep navy, glowing electric cyan (#43BFE3), warm golden-amber (#F59E0B), and soft violet highlights.

## NEGATIVE PROMPT
text, labels, words, letters, logos, watermark, signature, clay, claymorphic, pastel colors, cartoon, cute, toy, Play-Doh, bright white background, childish, emoji, flat icons, clip art, generic brain illustration, oversaturated single color, stock photo, blurry, low detail
